core.label: HTML Fundamentals
core.description: Document structure, elements, and semantic markup.

topics.label: Document Structure
topics.description: DOCTYPE, html, head, body. Every web page starts with this skeleton.

topics.label: Text Elements
topics.description: Headings (h1-h6), paragraphs, lists (ul, ol, li), links (a), and emphasis (em, strong).

topics.label: Images & Media
topics.description: img, video, audio, figure, figcaption. Responsive images with srcset.

topics.label: Links & Navigation
topics.description: Anchor tags, relative vs absolute URLs, target, download attribute.

topics.label: Forms & Inputs
topics.description: form, input types, textarea, select, button, label. Client-side validation.

topics.label: Semantic HTML
topics.description: header, nav, main, article, section, aside, footer. Semantic markup improves accessibility and SEO.

topics.label: Tables
topics.description: table, thead, tbody, tr, th, td. Use tables for tabular data, not layout.

topics.label: Meta Tags & SEO
topics.description: title, meta description, charset, viewport, Open Graph. Essential for SEO and social sharing.

topics.label: Accessibility (a11y)
topics.description: ARIA roles, alt text, keyboard navigation, and screen reader support. Build inclusive websites.

topics.label: HTML5 APIs
topics.description: Canvas, Geolocation, Web Storage, Drag & Drop, Web Workers overview.
